title: Retry behavior
go_no_go_summary: Claude rated the S18 implementation GO-quality with no P1 or code defects, but reported closeout NO-GO because the five evidence artifacts did not exist yet. One P0 closeout finding is resolved by evidence creation and final gate rerun. One P2 contract documentation drift finding is resolved by refreshing the S18 completion_gates evidence strings. One P3 note is informational.

findings.title: S18 production_ready evidence absent before closeout
findings.summary: Claude noted that contracts/control-plane-contract.json already marked S18 production_ready while docs/goal-closeout/rp00-p02-m03-s18 did not yet contain packet, command evidence, Claude review result, adjudication, and construction inspection.
findings.resolution: Added the S18 closeout evidence set under docs/goal-closeout/rp00-p02-m03-s18 and reran RP00 control-plane validation.

findings.title: Completion gate evidence strings still described S17
findings.summary: Claude found six completion_gates evidence strings still referenced RP00.P02.M03.S17 rollback behavior, the S17 evidence root, or the next S18 boundary.
findings.resolution: Updated implemented, tests, permission_audit, hermes_validation, claude_cross_validation, and human_approval completion gate evidence strings to describe S18 retry behavior and the S19 successor.

findings.title: Bundle documentation drift fix with evidence generation
findings.summary: Claude noted that the stale S17 strings should be fixed together with the evidence-generation ceremony rather than as an independent implementation change.
findings.resolution: Handled during this S18 closeout ceremony.

claude_cli.command: claude -p --model claude-opus-4-8 --effort max --permission-mode dontAsk --tools Read,Grep,Glob --disallowedTools Bash,Edit,Write,MultiEdit,NotebookEdit --output-format json

findings.title: S18 production_ready evidence absent before closeout
findings.summary: S18 evidence files are required before production_ready.

findings.title: Completion gate evidence strings still described S17
findings.summary: Six S17 strings were refreshed to S18 retry behavior.

findings.title: Bundle documentation drift fix with evidence generation
findings.summary: The documentation drift was corrected as part of the S18 evidence ceremony.

required_followups: Continue with RP00.P02.M03.S19 Unit test: happy path as the next subphase.
review_notes: Claude confirmed the S18 metadata-only retry behavior boundary, S17 rollback dependency, retry attempt policy, backoff schedule, dedupe, retry window metadata, recovery path metadata, incident traceability metadata, no-write flags, validators, tests, fixture parity, and S19 successor behavior.
There were no P1 findings and no S18 implementation code defects.
parsed_review.summary: Claude reported implementation GO and closeout NO-GO due to missing evidence. Evidence and contract text remediation are complete, so S18 is ready for final gate validation.

raw_claude_cli_result_summary.summary: Claude returned implementation GO and closeout NO-GO; P0/P2 closeout items are resolved by evidence creation, completion gate text refresh, and executable gates.
